  • Classes in com.airtribe.meditrack.entity used by com.airtribe.meditrack.entity
    Class
    Description
    Appointment
    Appointment entity with cloning support (deep copy).
    Bill
    Bill entity with Strategy pattern implementation.
    Doctor
    Doctor entity representing a healthcare professional with type-safe specialization.
    MedicalEntity
    Abstract base class for all medical entities.
    Patient
    Patient entity with cloning support (deep copy).
    Person
    Abstract base class for Person entities (Doctor and Patient).
